validation_queries.description: Check that we have some string entries
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM rocpd_string
validation_queries.error_message: No string entries found in rocpd_string table

validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM rocpd_string WHERE string LIKE '%_ompt_get_teaminfo%'
validation_queries.error_message: No __ompt_get_teaminfo(int, int*) function found in string table

validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM rocpd_string WHERE string LIKE '%ompt%'
validation_queries.error_message: No OMPT-related strings found in rocpd_string table

validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM top WHERE name IS NULL
validation_queries.error_message: Found entries with null function names in top table

validation_queries.description: Check for OpenMP functions present more than 20 times
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM top WHERE name LIKE '%omp%' AND total_calls > 20
validation_queries.error_message: No OpenMP functions found with more than 20 calls in top table

validation_queries.description: Check that all entries have valid duration
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM top WHERE total_duration <= 0
validation_queries.error_message: Found entries with zero or negative duration in top table

validation_queries.description: Check that percentage values are valid
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM top WHERE percentage < 0 OR percentage > 100
validation_queries.error_message: Found invalid percentage values (not between 0-100) in top table

validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM rocpd_region WHERE id IS NULL
validation_queries.error_message: Found entries with null id values in rocpd_region table

validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM rocpd_region WHERE name_id = 578
validation_queries.error_message: No entries found with name_id = 578 in rocpd_region table

validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM rocpd_region WHERE name_id = 586
validation_queries.error_message: No entries found with name_id = 586 in rocpd_region table

validation_queries.description: Check that start times are valid
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM rocpd_region WHERE start <= 0
validation_queries.error_message: Found entries with invalid start times in rocpd_region table

validation_queries.description: Check that end times are after start times
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM rocpd_region WHERE end <= start
validation_queries.error_message: Found entries where end time is not greater than start time
